description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Calling for groups to help make "Minkatsu Summer 2026" a success

Event date and time: Sunday, August 2, 2026 (Reiwa 8), 10:30 a.m. – 4:00 p.m.

Location: Citizen Activity Center (7th floor, Maruhiro Department Store Hanno)

What we're looking for: Groups that can run workshops open to people of all ages

Application period: Thursday, May 7, 2026 – Friday, May 22, 2026

How to apply: Visit the Citizen Activity Center in person and fill out a participation application form

Number of groups: 5 groups. If we receive more applications than spots available, selection will be made by lottery.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jitishinkoka/shiminkatudou/11245.html
summary: ℹ️ Recruiting groups for Minkatsu Summer 2026
